bullets: Pray for Nigeria, where gunmen killed three and abducted fifteen Christian worshippers during a night prayer gathering, asking God for the safe return of the captives and comfort for grieving families.
Pray for civilians across Ukraine sheltering from repeated large-scale missile and drone strikes, for the wounded to recover, and for the grieving to find comfort amid ongoing threats.
Lift up the people of Lebanon, especially those displaced by expanding airstrikes, asking God for protection of civilian lives and a lasting, just peace across the country.
Pray for the children and families living in displacement camps across Gaza, that they would be protected from harm, receive urgent humanitarian aid, and find safe shelter.
Ask God to bring healing and justice to prisoners in Venezuela suffering abuse and mistreatment in state custody, and for humane conditions to be established.
Pray for soldiers, civilians, and families in Pakistan grieving lives lost and wounded in a deadly bombing attack, and for an end to violence targeting both civilians and security forces.
Lift up the people of Cambodia, asking God for genuine rule of law, respect for political rights, and freedom for those unjustly imprisoned.
Pray for lawyers, journalists, and civil society voices in Tunisia facing prosecution for peaceful expression, that their rights would be protected and justice upheld.
Pray for communities in Timor-Leste affected by the recent offshore earthquake, asking God for safety, calm, and protection as residents assess any potential impacts.
Pray for people in Papua New Guinea shaken by a magnitude 5 earthquake, that God would grant safety and peace to all communities in this seismically active region.
